case_title: ART BLUM, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION vs. SELBY, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ART BLUM, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SELBY, ROBERT SELBY SPORTS, INC. DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-18-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-20-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-28-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-18-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-18-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR AUG-16-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-16-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-16-1996, SANCTION ON PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 PAYABLE 9/10/96. 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT & LOCAL RULES OF COURT. HEARING SET FOR SEP-16-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF STEVEN H. HERMAN IN RESPSONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE.

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-16-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 9/16/96: FOR A BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT. PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE A DECLARATIONS STATING CURRENT STATUS OF DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY CASE. HEARING SET FOR OCT-15-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF STEVEN H. HERMAN IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ART BLUM, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-15-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 10/15/96: FOR DISMISSAL. IF NO DISMISSAL AND OR GOOD CAUSE COURT WILL IMPOSE SANCTIONS. HEARING SET FOR NOV-14-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
